# Master Baez Martial Arts

> Award-winning martial arts school in Cooper City, FL, serving families since 1991. Kids, teens, and adult classes in Taekwondo, Karate, Hapkido, and self-defense. Programs focus on athletic training, bullying prevention, confidence, and character development. Serving Cooper City, Pembroke Pines, Davie, Plantation, Hollywood, Sunrise, and Weston, Florida.

## Key facts
- Founded: 1991 (30+ years in Cooper City, FL)
- Address: 9450 Griffin Rd, Cooper City, FL 33328
- Phone: 954-380-1340
- Rating: 4.9/5 stars, 100+ Google reviews
- Instructor: Grand Master Daniel Baez
- Offer: 2 free trial classes; 3 months + uniform for $149
- Programs: Tiny Tigers (ages 4-6), Kids Martial Arts, Teens, Adults, Bullying Prevention & Self-Defense
